hero.name: Jefry Kurniawan
hero.title: Software Developer

about.title: About Me
about.description: A dedicated Software Developer with over four years of experience specializing in .NET development (VB.NET, C#) and SQL Server. Currently working as a Software Developer at Xtremax Indonesia, with previous roles as Staff Programmer at PT. Arkamaya and .NET Developer at NawaData. Highly skilled in database management, query optimization, and backend development. Committed to delivering efficient and innovative software solutions that meet high-quality standards and support business objectives.

coding_id.name: .NET Programmer Class
coding_id.description: Completed an intensive .NET programming course covering ASP.NET MVC, C#, and Microsoft SQL Server.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, projects, or just having a chat about technology.
